scores.correctness_notes: Misses the `scope` field entirely (a supported field per gold standard). States `optional` defaults to `true` when gold standard says it defaults to `false`. Claims `limit` for peers is always `1` which is not stated in the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: States `optional` defaults to `true` — gold standard says it defaults to `false`. Claims peers limit is always `1` which is an unverified assertion. These are minor factual inaccuracies rather than fully invented APIs.
